top_headlines.title_en: Sensex, Nifty gain for third day in a row; easing volatility to support bull trend

top_headlines.title_en: Nifty, Sensex to rally more on Monday? Iran peace deal among 5 factors to dictate Dalal Street this week

top_headlines.title_en: Sensex, Nifty extend gains to 3rd day, Q4 results to guide stock-specific action

top_headlines.title_en: Mcap of 8 of top 10 most valued firms rise by  ₹1.90 lakh crore; ICICI Bank biggest gainer

top_headlines.title_en: Wall Street Is Gaining Access to New Catastrophe Models to Help Predict Wars
